description_long: This object is a modern military fighter jet, characterized by a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and sharply swept-back wings. The jet features a single, large engine exhaust at the rear and a bubble canopy cockpit positioned near the front of the fuselage, providing excellent visibility for the pilot. The wings are mid-mounted with noticeable leading-edge extensions and are equipped with hardpoints for external stores or weaponry. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers, forming a conventional tail design. The surface is finished in a matte gray camouflage, typical for combat aircraft, and the overall build suggests a high-performance, supersonic capability. The landing gear is not visible, indicating it is likely retractable and integrated into the fuselage and wings.
description: A sleek, gray military fighter jet with swept-back mid-mounted wings, a single rear engine, and a bubble canopy cockpit. The jet has a conventional tail and a streamlined, aerodynamic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, bubble canopy, and swept-back wings with visible hardpoints.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the elongated fuselage, single engine exhaust, and mid-mounted wings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the single vertical stabilizer, horizontal stabilizers, and the large engine exhaust.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to the left, showing the cockpit, wing configuration, and tail assembly.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept-back wings and leading-edge extensions; no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear (not visible, inferred from typical design)
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a bubble canopy
